title: stenogyne cinerea
intro: Stenogyne cinerea is a type of flowering plant species in the Lamiaceae family, commonly found in the Hawaiian Islands. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Stenogyne cinerea include reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Stenogyne cinerea are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can be used to support overall well-being and relieve various health symptoms.
